movie.actors: Tye Sheridan, Olivia Cooke, Ben Mendelsohn, Lena Waithe
movie.plot: When the creator of a virtual reality world called the OASIS dies, he releases a video in which he challenges all OASIS users to find his Easter Egg, which will give the finder his fortune.
movie.title: Ready Player One
movie.writer: Zak Penn (screenplay by), Ernest Cline (screenplay by), Ernest Cline (based on the novel by)
